93: Status ConvBackpropComputeDimensionsV2(
94:     StringPiece label, int num_spatial_dims, const TensorShape& input_shape,
95:     const TensorShape& filter_shape, const TensorShape& out_backprop_shape,
96:     const gtl::ArraySlice<int32>& dilations, const std::vector<int32>& strides,
97:     Padding padding, absl::Span<const int64> explicit_paddings,
98:     TensorFormat data_format, ConvBackpropDimensions* dims) {
99:   // The + 2 in the following line is for the batch and feature dimensions.
100:   const int num_dims = num_spatial_dims + 2;
101:   if (input_shape.dims() != num_dims) {
102:     return errors::InvalidArgument(label, ": input must be ", num_dims,
103:                                    "-dimensional");
104:   }
105:   if (filter_shape.dims() != num_dims) {
106:     return errors::InvalidArgument(label, ": filter must be ", num_dims,
107:                                    "-dimensional");
108:   }
109:   if (out_backprop_shape.dims() != num_dims) {
110:     return errors::InvalidArgument(label, ": out_backprop must be ", num_dims,
111:                                    "-dimensional");
112:   }
113:   int batch_dim = GetTensorBatchDimIndex(num_dims, data_format);
114:   dims->batch_size = input_shape.dim_size(batch_dim);
115:   if (dims->batch_size != out_backprop_shape.dim_size(batch_dim)) {
116:     return errors::InvalidArgument(
117:         label, ": input and out_backprop must have the same batch size",
118:         "input batch: ", dims->batch_size,
119:         "outbackprop batch: ", out_backprop_shape.dim_size(batch_dim),
120:         " batch_dim: ", batch_dim);
121:   }
122: 
123:   int feature_dim = GetTensorFeatureDimIndex(num_dims, data_format);
124:   dims->in_depth = input_shape.dim_size(feature_dim);
125:   // The input and output feature dimensions are the second last and last
126:   // dimensions of the filter Tensor.
127:   VLOG(2) << "input vs filter_in depth " << dims->in_depth << " "
128:           << filter_shape.dim_size(num_dims - 2);
129:   if (dims->in_depth % filter_shape.dim_size(num_dims - 2)) {
130:     return errors::InvalidArgument(
131:         label, ": input depth must be evenly divisible by filter depth");
132:   }
133:   dims->out_depth = filter_shape.dim_size(num_dims - 1);
134:   if (dims->out_depth != out_backprop_shape.dim_size(feature_dim)) {
135:     return errors::InvalidArgument(
136:         label, ": filter and out_backprop must have the same out_depth");
137:   }
138:   dims->spatial_dims.resize(num_spatial_dims);
139:   for (int i = 0; i < num_spatial_dims; ++i) {
140:     int image_dim = GetTensorSpatialDimIndex(num_dims, data_format, i);
141:     int64 padding_before = -1, padding_after = -1;
142:     if (padding == EXPLICIT) {
143:       padding_before = explicit_paddings[2 * image_dim];
144:       padding_after = explicit_paddings[2 * image_dim + 1];
145:     }
146:     TF_RETURN_IF_ERROR(ConvBackpropExtractAndVerifyDimension(
147:         label, input_shape, filter_shape, out_backprop_shape, dilations,
148:         strides, padding, padding_before, padding_after, image_dim, i,
149:         &dims->spatial_dims[i]));
150:   }
151:   return Status::OK();
152: }
153:
